title: Britannia Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Britannia Industries is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Britannia Industries has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Britannia Industries:
Britannia Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Britannia Industries!
